refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR included the phrase 'shall support achieving,' which can imply a solution approach. Replacing 'support achieving' with 'enable achieving' keeps the focus on the functional goal without implying how it is done. The FR is atomic as it focuses on a single functional objective: meeting the cycle time target for the specified cycle.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, and verify that the 95th percentile (p95) cycle time is less than or equal to the customer-defined target.
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load phase of the cycle.
The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the travel phase of the cycle.
The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the dump phase of the cycle.

candidate_dps: Optimize load handling mechanism to minimize load time
Optimize travel path and speed to minimize travel time
Optimize dump mechanism to minimize dump time
Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time
Implement adaptive cycle time control based on real-time conditions
selected_dp.selected_dp: Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump operations timing
Changes in one operation affecting others' durations
coupling_check.notes: The cycle time depends on the combined durations of load, travel, and dump phases, which are inherently coupled. Selecting a DP that coordinates these operations acknowledges this coupling but does not fully decouple them.

assumptions_risks: Assumes that operational policies and safety plans allow for optimization of cycle phases
Risk that site conditions variability may impact cycle time unpredictably
Assumes measurement of cycle time p95 is feasible and accurate under duty cycle
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Refine FR to separate cycle phases explicitly or introduce DPs that target each phase independently to improve decoupling and modularity in design.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Coordinates load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time across the system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives status updates and sends operational data for coordination

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands and task assignments to coordinate operations

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with vehicle and teleoperation modules for coordination

module_containment_scores.notes: Highly cohesive as it is the central coordination module; minimal diffusion outside.
Vehicle executes operations but does not coordinate them; coordination logic would diffuse outside.
Teleoperation may influence tasks but is not responsible for overall coordination; high diffusion.
Safety services are orthogonal to coordination; poor containment and high diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary for containing the coordination DP because it centralizes the logic for optimizing load, travel, and dump operations, minimizing diffusion and maximizing cohesion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module may grow if coordination logic is not well modularized internally.
Dependency on timely and reliable interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking, Network Link) may affect coordination effectiveness.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP logically addresses the FR by specifying coordination of load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time, directly targeting the customer-defined cycle time target.

diffusion_risks: Dependency on multiple external interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking, Network Link) introduces some risk of diffusion if coordination logic spreads outside the NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module has high containment (score 9) and low diffusion (score 1), indicating strong cohesion and appropriate encapsulation of the coordination DP. Other modules show higher diffusion scores, supporting the choice of NGHE Solution as the containment boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through measuring the cycle time p95 against the CT_target under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, as specified in acceptance criteria.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation is clear as the NGHE Solution module is the ownership candidate responsible for implementing the coordination DP to meet the FR.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing the internal coordination logic within the NGHE Solution module to manage potential complexity growth.
Ensure robust and reliable communication over the Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link interfaces to mitigate risks affecting coordination effectiveness.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed with strong justification: the DP logically addresses the FR, the NGHE Solution module provides high containment with low diffusion risk, and verification feasibility and allocation clarity are confirmed. Although there are some diffusion risks due to dependencies on external interfaces, these are mitigated by the high containment score and recommended modularization within the NGHE Solution module. Given the high safety criticality, it is prudent to maintain the current level and focus on robust implementation and verification rather than further decomposition at this stage.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module will maintain high containment and low diffusion as designed.
Verification conditions (duty cycle, site conditions) will be controlled to ensure meaningful measurement of cycle time p95.
Communication over Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link interfaces will be robust and reliable as recommended.
open_risks: Dependency on multiple external interfaces may introduce diffusion risk if coordination logic spreads outside the NGHE Solution module.
Potential complexity growth within the coordination logic may affect maintainability and verification.
evidence_needed: Verification data showing cycle time p95 meets CT_target under specified conditions.
Design documentation confirming modularization of internal coordination logic within NGHE Solution module.
Test results validating communication reliability over external interfaces.
